heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 95–467, title IV, § 410(a)92 Stat. 1316Oct. 17, 1978
label: 1959 to 1959h Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 95–467, title IV, § 410(a)92 Stat. 1316Oct. 17, 1978
notes: Section 1959, , , , set out Congressional findings and policy in enacting conversion of saline water legislation. See .Pub. L. 92–60, § 285 Stat. 159section 7831 of this titleJuly 29, 1971
Section 1959a, , , , set out general duties of Secretary of the Interior in the area of conversion of saline water. See .Pub. L. 92–60, § 385 Stat. 159section 7832 of this titleJuly 29, 1971

Section 1959b, , , , set out additional duties of Secretary of the Interior in area of conversion of saline water, such as conducting preliminary investigations, exploring potential cooperative agreements, reporting to the President and Congress, utilizing Federal agencies’ expertise and accepting financial assistance from State and other public agencies. See .Pub. L. 92–60, § 485 Stat. 160section 7833 of this titleJuly 29, 1971
Section 1959c, , , , set out powers of Secretary of the Interior. See .Pub. L. 92–60, § 585 Stat. 160section 7871 of this titleJuly 29, 1971

Section 1959d, , , , provided for coordination of saline water conversion activities with Department of Defense, cooperation of Secretary of the Interior’s activities with the Environmental Protection Agency and other Federal agencies, availability of research information and developments, continued validity of patent rights, publication of rules in the Federal Register, disposal of water and byproducts, dispositions of moneys and nonalteration of existing water ownership and control laws. See sections 7877(a) and 7879 of this title.Pub. L. 92–60, § 685 Stat. 161July 29, 1971
Section 1959e, , , , authorized Secretary of the Interior to issue rules and regulations. See .Pub. L. 92–60, § 785 Stat. 162section 7834 of this titleJuly 29, 1971
Section 1959f, , , , required Secretary of the Interior to submit a report to the President and Congress. See .Pub. L. 92–60, § 885 Stat. 162section 7880 of this titleJuly 29, 1971
Section 1959g, , , , defined terms used in this chapter. See .Pub. L. 92–60, § 985 Stat. 162section 7835 of this titleJuly 29, 1971

Section 1959h, , , ; , , , authorized appropriations for saline water conversion programs. See sections 7873 and 7874 of this title.Pub. L. 92–60, § 1085 Stat. 162Pub. L. 95–84, § 1(a)(2)91 Stat. 400July 29, 1971Aug. 2, 1977

Short Title, , , which provided that , which enacted sections 1959 to 1959h of this title and repealed sections 1951 to 1958 of this title may be cited as “The Saline Water Conversion Act of 1971” was repealed by , , .Pub. L. 92–60, § 185 Stat. 159Pub. L. 92–60Pub. L. 95–467, title IV, § 410(a)92 Stat. 1316July 29, 1971Oct. 17, 1978

Annual Authorization of AppropriationsAnnual authorization for appropriations for the saline water conversion programs for fiscal years authorized by former were contained in the following appropriations acts:section 1959h(b) of this title, , .Pub. L. 95–84, § 1(b)91 Stat. 400Aug. 2, 1977, , .Pub. L. 94–316, § 190 Stat. 694June 22, 1976, , .Pub. L. 94–3889 Stat. 217June 19, 1975, , .Pub. L. 93–34288 Stat. 295July 10, 1974, , .Pub. L. 92–5187 Stat. 129July 1, 1973, , .Pub. L. 92–27386 Stat. 122Apr. 17, 1972

Inventions—Definition, Title, and Licensing, , , which provided that relative to the definition of, title to, and licensing of inventions made or conceived in the course of or under any contract or grant pursuant to the Water Resources Research Act of 1964 ( et seq.) or the Saline Water Conversion Act of 1971 ( et seq.), and that notwithstanding any other provision of law, the Secretary was to be governed by the provisions of sections 9 and 10 of the Federal Non-nuclear Energy, Research, and Development Act of 1974 (, 5909), provided, however, that subsecs. () and (n) of were not to apply to this act, was omitted in view of the repeal of the Water Resources Research Act of 1964 and the Saline Water Conversion Act of 1971 by , , .Pub.
